outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Netanyahu reveals he quietly underwent treatment for prostate cancer during the Iran war
outlets.summary: Israeli PM Netanyahu reveals secret prostate cancer diagnosis and treatment during the war. Declared cancer-free. Delayed disclosure to prevent Iranian propaganda.

outlets.name: The Intercept
outlets.headline: Pentagon Erases Wounded U.S. Troops From Iran War Casualty List
outlets.summary: Pentagon quietly removed 15 wounded from official casualty count. Internal DCAS data shows 23% higher figures than CENTCOM public claims.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump rejects idea of nuclear weapon against Iran as Israel-Lebanon ceasefire gets extended
outlets.summary: Trump announces 3-week Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extension. Rejects nuclear weapons use. Says Iran must stop funding Hezbollah. 'I have all the time in the World, but Iran doesn't.'

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Bessent sanctions 14 entities in 'Economic Fury' campaign against Iran weapons procurement
outlets.summary: Treasury's 'Economic Fury' campaign targets Iran, Turkey, and UAE entities aiding Iranian weapons procurement.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Oil rises above $106 per barrel as US-Iran deadlocked in Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Brent crude surges above $107 as only 5 ships transit Hormuz in 24 hours. Iran parliament speaker resigns from negotiating team. Araghchi heading to Islamabad for Round 2 talks.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil killed in Israeli strike during ceasefire
outlets.summary: Al-Akhbar reporter Amal Khalil killed in Israeli airstrike in southern Lebanon. CPJ calls for urgent international investigation.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF hits Hezbollah targets in south Lebanon; kills operative in first post-ceasefire targeted strike
outlets.summary: IDF kills Hezbollah operative near Kounine in drone strike — first targeting of operatives since ceasefire. IDF drone shot down over Tyre. Netanyahu reveals prostate cancer.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Trump Is Fed Up With the Iran War. That's No Guarantee He Won't Restart It
outlets.summary: Analysis of Trump's frustration with war progress. Despite extending ceasefire, no guarantee of lasting de-escalation. Netanyahu cancer revelation adds uncertainty.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pentagon 'covers up' US casualties of war against Iran
outlets.summary: Iranian state media highlights Intercept report on Pentagon removing 15 wounded from casualty count. Frames as evidence of US deception about war costs.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran leaders reject Trump claims of internal divisions — 'We are all Iranians and revolutionaries'
outlets.summary: Coordinated unity statement from Pezeshkian, Araghchi, Qalibaf, Aref, Eje'i. 'There are no hardliners or moderates in Iran.' FM Araghchi heading to Islamabad for Round 2 talks.
